hero.title: Internet History of Pakistan
hero.description: Tracing the journey from dial‑up cafes to nationwide fibre and mobile broadband and the people, policies and platforms that reshaped daily life.

cards.title: Introduction
cards.description: Journey from pioneering ISPs and university networks to the first email gateway that connected Pakistan to the world.

cards.title: Evolution
cards.description: Witness the leap from dial up to DSL, 3G/4G rollouts and early trials mapped on an interactive timeline.

cards.title: Impact
cards.description: See how connectivity shaped commerce, education, politics, and culture from e‑commerce to digital rights.

cards.title: Future
cards.description: Look ahead to the next decade: border fibre, 5G use cases, AI adoption and youth led innovation.
